verdict.evidence: Two subtle modifications were found: (1) 'muutamia' (a few) was changed to 'useita' (several), slightly exaggerating the number of objects detected. (2) 'hyvin vakavasti' (very seriously) was changed to 'erittäin vakavasti' (extremely seriously), subtly intensifying the minister's statement. These are not outright fabricated additions of new facts but rather modifications of existing details that alter their meaning.
